subcodes.first_line: O Temple! Rejoice thou within thyself, inasmuch as We have raised thee up through the tablets of utterance and sustained thee through the name of thy Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هیکل ان افرح فی نفسک بما بنیناک من زبر البیان و عمرناک باسم ربک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @idolatry, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @attainment to faith in the twinkling of an eye, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
